10_yield_to_me_the: Yield to me the throne of Silmaria, or I shall release the Dragon and destroy everything!
11_how_dare_you_accuse: How dare you accuse me of being a villain? I have always aided Silmaria, and guided her faithfully.
12_why_are_you_telling: Why are you telling me these things? I am not the one responsible for the assassin. Do not insult my honor, Prince of Shapeir. I am not a villain.
13_how_should_i_know: How should I know? She is no doubt trying to discover the real culprit behind these crimes, instead of asking meaningless questions.
14_so_the_person_behind: So the person behind all these crimes is still unknown. He is obviously a devious and subtle individual. I would not be surprised if he tries some other method to take over this kingdom.
15_in_fact_considering_the: In fact, considering the omens lately, it would not surprise me that the master villain has the Prophecy Stone in his possession. I believe he will threaten to release the Dragon unless he is put on the throne.
16_however_i_believe_i: However, I believe I can stop this villain. I have in my power the resources to regain the Prophecy Stone. I will make certain that Silmaria will not be threatened by the Dragon of Doom.
17_you_have_only_to: You have only to crown me King.
18_it_would_be_most: It would be most unfortunate if it should come to that. The choice is clearly yours. Award me the throne of Silmaria, or suffer the tyranny of threats and destruction.
19_so_bruno_confessed_before: So Bruno confessed before he died? And you believe an assassin's word against my reputation?
1_elsa_von_spielburg_has: Elsa von Spielburg has proven herself to be a leader and a Hero in the lands to the north. She is quite capable of becoming the first woman King of Silmaria as well. I, Minos, counselor to Silmaria, am proud to sponsor her.
20_do_not_think_you: Do not think you can threaten me! I make a very dangerous enemy. Apologize to me in front of all these people, or I will not take your slanders lightly.
21_you_are_fools_both: You are fools, both of you. You should have arrested me instead of just talking to me. I will control Silmaria, despite your attempts to stop me.
22_i_have_the_prophecy: I have the Prophecy Stone in my possession. One by one, I have fulfilled the omens. Either yield to me Silmaria, or I will release the Dragon of Doom. You and all of Silmaria will be destroyed!
23_then_enough_of_this: Then enough of this! I will rule Silmaria despite your foolish contests. I have the Prophecy Stone in my possession. One by one, I have fulfilled the omens of destruction.
24_you_will_crown_me: You will crown me King of Silmaria, or I shall release the Doom that befell Atlantis, and the Dragon will destroy you all!
25_i_have_no_idea: I have no idea. She is probably searching for the master villain behind all these misdeeds, trying to win the Rite of Justice fairly. Elsa will make a far better ruler than you could ever be, oh Prince of Shapeir.
26_you_dare_to_accuse: You dare to accuse me, who has advised the King and supported Silmaria for years. My forefathers once ruled Marete, and you believe that I would hire forces to destroy Silmaria, that I would...
27_oh_very_well_i: Oh, very well. I do like the threat part.
28_then_enough_of_this: Then enough of this! I will rule Silmaria despite you foolish Heroes. I'm smarter than you are any day.  I have the Prophecy Stone in my possession. One by one, I have fulfilled the omens of destruction.
29_you_will_crown_me: You will crown me King of Silmaria, or I shall release the Doom that befell Atlantis, and the Dragon will destroy you all!
2_elsa_shall_choose_ios: Elsa shall choose Ios, for it is closest to my island.
30_you_think_you_have: You think you have won, do you? You are mistaken.
31_so_you_have_made: So, you have made it all the way here, despite my guards and protections. You really are a most persistent Hero, aren't you?
32_you_would_have_actually: You would have actually made a good King of Silmaria. Pity you are the very instrument of Silmaria's destruction. That is, of course, unless you die!
33_guards_you_idiots_get: Guards, you idiots, get in here!
34_i_will_not_be: I will not be defeated. I will destroy everything, and you both will die.
35_i_hold_the_prophecy: I hold the Prophecy Stone in my hands. When it breaks, the Dark Dragon will rise to destroy all of Silmaria. If I cannot rule what is rightfully mine, then I shall destroy it.
36_you_cannot_stop_me: You cannot stop me. No one can stop me. I am your doom.
37_im_very_pleased_to: I'm very pleased to see you here. I so look forward to seeing you die.
38_welcome_to_my_treasure: Welcome to my treasure room. You too will soon die.
39_well_now_i_have: Well now. I have the three of you trapped. Good. This will be most entertaining.
3_forgive_me_elsa_but: Forgive me, Elsa, but I only wished to assure your success. Ios is still the best choice.
4_then_enough_of_this: Then enough of this! I will rule Silmaria despite your foolish toys. I have the Prophecy Stone in my possession. One by one, I have fulfilled the omens of destruction.
5_you_will_crown_me: You will crown me King of Silmaria, or I shall release the Doom that befell Atlantis, and the Dragon will destroy you all!
6_you_dare_to_accuse: You dare to accuse me of attempting to subvert Silmaria? I am a wealthy and powerful man. Why would I care about such a minor kingdom?
7_why_are_you_telling: Why are you telling me about this assassin? Surely you don't believe that I have anything to do with this?
8_you_too_accuse_me: You, too, accuse me of this, Logos? I, Minos, who has aided this kingdom again and again?
9_i_have_had_enough: I have had enough of this foolishness! I shall rule Marete, as did the ancient Kings of my family. I have the Prophecy Stone in my possession.
